title: The Binding Of Isaac | Useful Items
description: Entities, objects, cards, effects... All in one!
body:
![](https://i.ibb.co/d2THtxY/TBOI-MOD-LOGO.png)
![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/WOLcDMnd?color=%23000001)


Have you ever imagined having The Binding Of Isaac items in Minecraft? Well, this mod will allow you to use many pick-ups and items from the game.

![](https://i.ibb.co/YNFccFC/features.png)

* **NEW!** Characters
* **NEW!** Be Isaac's friend!
* Enemies
* Cards
* Bombs
* Keys
* Chests
* Items
* Hearts
* Pills
